reason: This task is the contract source for public-site + admin-review. Schema decisions (enum key vs label, FK integrity, PRAGMA foreign_keys, status machine, tag alias merge) ripple to all downstream layers. Multiple consumers read the same events/tags tables.

src/lib/db/ is the shared access layer that public-site and admin-review both extend. STATUS/TYPES/SCALES constants and getDB/ensureFK helpers are shared utilities — search-before-create and extension-friendly design apply.
